indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains prevent natural light control and privacy, essential for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or objects
indicators.rationale: The empty space has no furniture or objects, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no lighting or light control
indicators.rationale: No lighting or light control options make it impossible to create a sleep-friendly environment.

reasoning_summary: This space is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There is no bed or resting surface, no windows or curtains for light control, and no furniture or objects to create a comfortable environment. The lack of lighting options further compounds the issue, making it impossible to create a sleep-friendly environment.
